version_description: This one plays the baseline walkdown (D-C-B-Bb) and sounds closer to the original. The other ones want standard open chords when they don't fit very well.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
CAPO ON 5

[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
e|----X-------X-------X-------X--------
B|---X/1------1-------X------X/1-------
G|----2-------0-------2-------2--------
D|----2-------2------2/0-----2/0-------[/tab]
[ch]A[/ch]|----0-------X-------X-------X--------
[ch]E[/ch]|----X-------3-------2-------1--------

- The slashes mean you can choose between the two and they're still good.
- The D chord might not be a D chord but that's what I'm going to call it.


[Verse]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I'm sorry if I seem uninterested[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]Am7[/ch]
Or I'm not listenin', or I'm indifferent[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Truly I ain't got no business here[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]Am7[/ch]
But since my friends are here, I just came to kick it[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
But really I would rather be at home all by myself[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]Am7[/ch]
Not in this room with people who don't even care about my well being[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I don't dance, don't ask, I don't need a boyfriend[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Am7[/ch]
So you can, go back, please enjoy your party[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I'll be here, somewhere in the corner[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]Am7[/ch]
Under clouds of marijuana with this boy whose hollerin'[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
I can hardly hear[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Over this music I don't listen to[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
And I don't wanna get with you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am7[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
So tell my friends that I'll be over here[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh oh oh here, oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am7[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
Oh oh oh I asked myself, what am I doin' here?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh oh oh here, oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am7[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
And I can't wait 'til we can break up out of here[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Excuse me if I seem a little unimpressed with this[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]Am7[/ch]
An antisocial pessimist, but usually I don't mess with this[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And I know you mean only the best and your[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]Am7[/ch]
Intentions aren't to bother me, but honestly I'd rather be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Somewhere with my people, we can kick it and just listen to[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]Am7[/ch]
Some music with a message, (Like we usually do)[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And we'll discuss our big dreams, how we plan, to take over the planet[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]
So pardon my manners, I hope you'll understand that I'll be here (Ooh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Not there in the kitchen[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]Am7[/ch]
With the girl who's always gossipin' about her friends[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Oh tell them I'll be here[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
(Ooh) right next to the boy who's throwin' up[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Am7[/ch]
'Cause he can't take what's in his cup no more[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
Oh God why am I here?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh oh oh here, oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am7[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
Oh oh oh I asked myself, what am I doin' here?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh oh oh here, oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am7[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
And I can't wait 'til we can break up out of here[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Hours later congregatin' next to the refrigerator[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                    [ch]Am7[/ch]
Some girl's talkin' 'bout her haters, she ain't got none[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
How did it ever come to this? I should've never come to this[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]Am7[/ch]
So holla at me, I'll be in the car when you're done[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I'm stand-offish, don't want what you're offerin'[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
And I'm done talkin', awfully sad it had to be that way[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
So tell my people when they're ready that I'm ready[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]Am7[/ch] 
And I'm standin' by the TV with my beanie low[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
Yo I'll be over here[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh oh oh here, oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am7[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
Oh oh oh I asked myself, what am I doin' here?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh oh oh here, oh oh oh here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am7[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
And I can't wait 'til we can break up out of here[/tab]
